author: aamodbhatt
name: Warmdown Fix 9x512 1xH100 10m
blurb: Non-record 16MB run on 1xH100 with baseline 9x512 architecture and a scheduler adjustment (WARMDOWN_ITERS=100) to better fit 1-GPU step times. This yields a modest score improvement versus same-session 1x baseline while staying within size limits.
